description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a mix of white and natural wood exterior finishes. The structure is composed of two main volumes with intersecting gable roofs, punctuated by several skylights and large windows that allow ample natural light. The front facade showcases a prominent vertical wooden panel adjacent to a large glass sliding door, while the rear includes a garage with a flat roof and additional windows. The side elevations are simpler, with minimal window openings and clean lines. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a low brick base, suggesting a raised foundation. Overall, the design emphasizes geometric forms, functional spaces, and a blend of privacy and openness.
description: A modern two-story house with intersecting gable roofs, white and wood exterior, large windows, and a garage. The design features clean lines and a mix of privacy and openness.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a vertical wooden panel, large glass sliding doors, and intersecting gable roofs.
description_view_1: Rear view with a plain white wall, minimal windows, and the gable roof structure clearly visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garage with a flat roof, additional windows, and a mix of white and wood finishes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the angular rooflines and the absence of major openings or decorative elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and skylights
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a vertical wooden panel, large glass sliding doors, and no porch or steps, emphasizing a minimalist modern aesthetic.
